summary: TemaDom Iteration 22 - Homepage redesign & EUR pricing. All 19 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. EUR pricing verified: Starter 17, Pro 35, Premium 69. Standalone services: PDF contract 5 EUR, AI blueprint 15 EUR. Homepage redesigned with hero text 'без непредвидени разходи', 'Защо TemaDom?' section with 3 cards, 'Топ функции' section with AI Дизайнер/Sketch/Calculator/Gallery features, 'Как работи?' 4 steps. 'Дизайнери' section correctly removed from navbar.
passed_tests: ✅ AI Designer bundle prices: 3 variants = 25 EUR, 5 variants = 39 EUR
✅ Starter has limitations (Ограничен, Без AI, Без приоритетно показване)
✅ Pro has AI Designer 1 variant limitation
✅ Hero text: 'Вашият строителен проект без непредвидени разходи'
✅ 'Защо TemaDom?' section with 3 cards (За клиенти, За фирми, За майстори)
✅ 'Топ функции на TemaDom' section with AI ДИЗАЙНЕР, AI SKETCH, КАЛКУЛАТОР + PDF, AI ГАЛЕРИЯ
✅ Feature buttons navigate correctly: AI Дизайнер -> /ai-designer, AI Sketch -> /ai-sketch, Калкулатор -> /calculator, AI Галерия -> /ai-gallery
✅ Pricing overview: Starter 17, Pro 35, Premium 69 EUR/мес
✅ Standalone prices: PDF договор 5 EUR, AI анализ чертежи 15 EUR
✅ 'Как работи?' section with 4 steps (Калкулация, AI визуализация, PDF документи, Изпълнение)
✅ Navbar dropdown 'Още' opened with AI Дизайнер, AI Sketch, AI Галерия, Абонаменти links
✅ Subscriptions page shows 3 plans with EUR pricing and limitations
✅ 'Еднократни услуги' section shows PDF contract (5 EUR) and AI blueprint (15 EUR)
✅ AI Designer module shows 10 EUR/генерация with bundle prices 25/39 EUR
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features verified and working correctly:
1. Homepage redesign complete with hero text, 'Защо TemaDom?', 'Топ функции', 'Как работи?' sections
2. EUR pricing updated: Starter 17, Pro 35, Premium 69 (30% reduction from previous BGN prices)
3. New standalone services: PDF contract 5 EUR, AI blueprint 15 EUR
5. AI Designer 10 EUR/gen with bundle prices (25 EUR/3 variants, 39 EUR/5 variants)
6. Plan limitations properly shown for Starter and Pro

(4 steps), 2) EUR pricing: Starter 17 EUR, Pro 35 EUR, Premium 69 EUR, 3) Standalone services: PDF договор 5 EUR, AI анализ чертежи 15 EUR, 4) 'Дизайнери' section removed from navbar, 5) AI Designer 10 EUR/gen with bundles 25/39 EUR. All navigation and feature buttons working correctly.
